external_dependencies.name: notify (Rust crate)
external_dependencies.purpose: Cross-platform filesystem event watching for JSONL and .git directories

external_dependencies.name: Ollama HTTP API
external_dependencies.purpose: Local LLM inference for realtime distillation

external_dependencies.name: Cloud LLM API (configurable provider)
external_dependencies.purpose: Higher quality LLM for batch compression and direction detection

external_dependencies.name: Git CLI
external_dependencies.purpose: Git status, log, and remote parsing via subprocess

external_dependencies.name: x11rb / xcb
external_dependencies.purpose: X11 window enumeration, focus switching, click-through property setting

external_dependencies.name: Tauri 2.0
external_dependencies.purpose: Desktop app framework: Rust backend + WebView frontend, window management, IPC

global_error_strategy.api_error_format: Tauri IPC uses Result<T, String> for command responses. Frontend receives { ok: T } or { error: string }.
global_error_strategy.external_service: LLM failures: queue + exponential backoff (max 5 retries, base 2s). Git CLI failures: log warning, skip signal. Ollama health check on startup with setup guide fallback.
global_error_strategy.logging: Rust tracing crate with file rotation to ~/.stash/logs/. Levels: ERROR (user-impacting), WARN (degraded), INFO (lifecycle events), DEBUG (development). Max 10MB log retention.

auto_decisions.decision: Use multi-window Tauri architecture (pet-window + panel-window) instead of single window
alternatives: Single window with CSS pointer-events switching
auto_decisions.rationale: Pet window requires click-through + transparent + always-on-top simultaneously. Panel window needs normal mouse interaction. Mutually exclusive X11 window properties.
auto_decisions.impact: Two Tauri WebView processes. ~5MB extra memory.

auto_decisions.decision: Store timestamps as INTEGER (Unix epoch seconds) not TEXT (ISO 8601)
auto_decisions.rationale: Integer comparison is faster for time-range queries (compression age checks). Most compact storage.
auto_decisions.impact: Frontend must convert to display format.

auto_decisions.decision: Use Git CLI subprocess instead of git2/libgit2 binding
auto_decisions.rationale: Git CLI guaranteed present (context dependency). Avoids 3MB+ binary size. Only need simple operations.
auto_decisions.impact: ~10ms subprocess overhead per call. Acceptable given 30s minimum interval.

auto_decisions.decision: Brain as single module with internal structs rather than 4 separate modules
alternatives: Separate context, status, distillation, compression modules
auto_decisions.rationale: Tight state coupling. Splitting increases messaging overhead without benefit for a small app.
auto_decisions.impact: Larger single module (~800 LOC) but simpler dependency graph.

auto_decisions.decision: UUID v7 (time-ordered) for all primary keys
auto_decisions.rationale: Time-sortable, benefits timeline queries and SQLite B-tree locality.
auto_decisions.impact: Requires uuid crate with v7 feature.
